suite.name: UAT TEST13

test.name: Test Cronjob 90 Days By Click UI + API Trigger

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: [STEP] User submits deletion request via UI
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: User Submit Deletion Request Via UI
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(), 'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(text(), 'บัญชีของฉัน')]

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Isaac1234' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกรหัสผ่านของคุณ']'.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('TAB',) to xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกรหัสผ่านของคุณ'] element.
Pressing special key TAB to element.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกรหัสผ่านของคุณ']
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Create Session

kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://painamnaesoftenscrumteam-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '47', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "Test12", "password": "Isaac1234"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console

test.doc: User ยื่นคำขอผ่าน UI -> Admin อนุมัติผ่าน UI -> fast-forward + trigger cron ผ่าน API -> ตรวจ DELETED + audit

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: UAT-TEST13: ยื่นลบบัญชี + อนุมัติแบบคลิกหน้าเว็บ แล้วทดสอบ cron 90 วันด้วย fast-forward
